CREATE TABLE test_vectors (vec1 Array(Float32), vec2 Array(Float32));
SELECT L2SquaredDistance([1.5, 2.5, 3.5], [1.5, 2.5, 3.5]) AS result FROM test_vectors LIMIT 1;
SELECT t1.vec1, t2.vec2, L2SquaredDistance(t1.vec1, t2.vec2) FROM (SELECT vec1 FROM test_vectors) AS t1, (SELECT vec2 FROM test_vectors) AS t2;
CREATE TABLE test_distances AS SELECT vec1, vec2, L2SquaredDistance(vec1, vec2) AS distance FROM test_vectors;
SELECT * FROM test_vectors WHERE L2SquaredDistance(vec1, vec2) < 10;
